chronic.route: Hunter Williams (2026-05-25, 28:48): "the injectable one or two Sub-Q or IM works great." https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/20-fat-loss-compounds-ranked-worst-to-best-no-glp-1s--55fd586f/

chronic.duration: Hunter Williams (2026-05-25, 28:48): "You can do it eight to 12 weeks on, four weeks off." https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/20-fat-loss-compounds-ranked-worst-to-best-no-glp-1s--55fd586f/ Hunter Williams (2026-03-29, 10:41): "you going have to use it for four to six weeks and take another four or six week off in between." https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/5-amino-1mq---build-muscle-and-burn-fat-at-the-same-time--d1aeae66/
chronic.verbatim_citation: Hunter Williams — 20-fat-loss-compounds-ranked-worst-to-best-no-glp-1s--55fd586f (2026-05-25, 28:15): "I like one to two milligrams injected per day. I would even start with maybe 0.5 milligrams, work your way up to one milligram." https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/20-fat-loss-compounds-ranked-worst-to-best-no-glp-1s--55fd586f/

reset_biology_synthesis.female_specific_notes: Taylor Williams (2025-03-14, 00:16:30.880): "I literally just listen to my body and feel it out." https://youtu.be/aYuXqSfhPYE Taylor Williams (2025-03-14, 00:16:09.399): "I like to first start off with 500 micrograms and then I will actually then increase to 750 micrograms and then I will increase to 1 milligram." https://youtu.be/aYuXqSfhPYE Taylor Williams (2025-03-14, 00:22:05.320): "take it for um five days on two days off." https://youtu.be/aYuXqSfhPYE Taylor Williams (2025-03-14, 00:16:37.759): "I usually will take this peptide over between four to 6 weeks and even 4 to 8 weeks and then I will come off of it for four weeks before I start it again." https://youtu.be/aYuXqSfhPYE
